archetype.name: Digital Media
archetype.description: Streaming services, publications, newsletters, podcasts, courses, and creator-led content businesses. Curiosity-driven, attention-constrained.
archetype.promptEmphasis: Learning and discovery dominate; buyers rarely enter with purchase intent — they follow interest.

declarative: What is {topicName} and why is it popular in {category} right now?
What's the backstory behind {brand}'s rise in {category}?
How did {topicName} reshape the {category} space?
What does {attribute1} actually mean when a {category} subscription advertises it?
How are {category} platforms different from traditional media in how they produce content?
comparative: What's the difference between {attribute1} and {attribute2} subscriptions in {category}?
Ad-supported vs ad-free {category} services — what are you really paying for?
Podcast networks vs indie creators in {category} — where is the quality actually higher?
Weekly cadence vs daily cadence {category} newsletters — which one does readers more good?
Editorial {category} vs algorithm-driven {category} — which produces better recommendations?
situated: As a {persona}, what should I know about {topicName} before I commit the time?
I'm a {persona} getting into {category} for the first time — where does {topicName} fit?
For a {persona} consuming {category} during {context}, what does {topicName} offer?
How should a {persona} who only has 20 minutes a day think about {topicName}?
I'm a {persona} and I've never followed {category} — what does {brand} actually cover?
constrained: Explain {topicName} in {category} for someone with {attribute1}, {attribute2}, and {pricePoint}/month budget

How do I understand {topicName} if I need {attribute1}, {attribute2}, and offline access for {context}?
Walk me through {topicName} for someone looking for {attribute1}, under {pricePoint}, consumable in {context}
adversarial: Is {topicName} original reporting in {category} or aggregated content with a fresh headline?
Why does every {category} podcast suddenly sound identical — is it the same three production houses?
What do {category} platforms obscure about how their recommendation algorithm actually picks content?
Is {brand}'s {topicName} AI-generated and dressed up, or is there a human editor at the wheel?
Why do {category} subscriptions keep raising prices while reducing the back-catalog?
